one_time_description: Specific claims settlement received during the year
economic_notes: Fisher River Economic Development Corporation operates economic development business activities. Fisher River Grocery provides retail outlet for gasoline, groceries and confectionary items. Castle Building Supplies operates building supply business. Video Lottery Terminal operations generate revenue. Ochekwi-Sipi Personal Care Home Inc. provides care to residents. First Nations Healing Centre Inc. provides shelter for victims of family violence.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Large one-time specific claims settlement of $15,095,391 received. 14 consolidated entities including numbered Manitoba companies and operating subsidiaries. Agriculture and Agri-Food revenue of $10,845,046 recorded in prior year 2021 with no equivalent in current year. Housing expenses_housing combines Housing segment ($1,397,521) and CMHC Housing Authority ($1,753,587). expenses_enterprises represents Fisher River Economic Development Corporation. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $8,065,811 to $15,891,071. Net debt position of $28,966,922. Investments in Castle Building Centres and 10552763 Canada Corporation held at cost.
